So what can we learn from this video? Like the gorilla or the changing curtain color, we often fail to register important features of the situation that are right in front of us, such as the powerful principles of influence. In almost any influence situation, one or more of the principles are naturally present, but just like the gorilla or the curtain changing, we don't readily see them because we're not looking for them. A sleuth goes looking for the principle that's already there, that is naturally available to employ, and then points to it so as to bring it into awareness in the mind of the person to be influenced.
